title: Important Update: Excel Utilities for Updated ITR Filing for AY 2022-23 Now Live!
content:
# Important Update: Excel Utilities for Updated ITR Filing for AY 2022-23 Now Live!

Ek important update hai. Government ne Assessment Year (AY) 2022-23 ke liye updated return (ITR-1 to 7) file karne ke liye Excel Utilities announce kiye hain. These utilities, as per Finance Act, 2026, are now available for filing as of June 19, 2026.

**Key Details:**
*   **What:** Excel Utilities for filing Updated Income Tax Returns (ITR-1 to ITR-7).
*   **For Which AY:** Assessment Year 2022-23.
*   **Legal Basis:** As per the Finance Act, 2026.
*   **Availability Date:** These utilities were made available on June 19, 2026, on the Income Tax Department's e-filing portal.

This step aims to facilitate taxpayers in complying with their updated return obligations. Taxpayers can now download the relevant Excel utility, prepare their updated returns, and file them on the e-filing portal.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Utilities here](https://www.incometax.gov.in/iec/foportal/downloads)

*Published on: 19 June 2026*
